Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in the variant leading to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total resolution time of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation when followed by Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the end of case where activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission occurs

Name: Time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants that include Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases that undergo multiple revision cycles
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection or SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that result in SW-EIC Major Revision versus those that result in SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to be performed after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases where Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 is triggered
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed compared to the time from Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation to RW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case trajectory
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time for Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to lead to any EIC decision (e.g., SW-Awaiting EIC Decision) in variants without reviewer delays
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include \SW-Reviewer Selection is now due\ or \SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late\
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average cycle time of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation when the subsequent path includes immediate plagiarism checks versus delayed checklist completion
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the end of case where activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurs

Name: Minimum time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in high-performance variants (performance < 500000)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'", 'aggregation': 'minimum', 'filter': 'code < 500000'}"
